title: Allay of Undying
description: A simple resource pack that turns your Totem of Undying into an adorable Golden Allay!
body:
![Allay of Undying Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9dfe869c85fb44510ccb83aa9ff7da0bf914869_0.webp)

Check out my [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@MqryoPacks) channel and [Twitter](https://x.com/MqryoPacks) here! :D

# _✨Allay of Undying!✨_

This resource pack turns your everyday Totem of Undying into an adorable Golden Allay that sits on your shoulder! :D

If you like the totem, check out also [Shiny Mobs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shiny-mob), where the allay is alive and its available in your world!
